properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for API CORS.

properties.name: app.security.jwt-secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.admin.bootstrap-enabled
properties.description: Create default admin account at startup when true.

properties.name: app.admin.username
properties.description: Default admin username used for bootstrap.

properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Default admin email used for bootstrap.

properties.name: app.admin.password
properties.description: Default admin password used for bootstrap.

properties.name: app.admin.full-name
properties.description: Default admin full name used for bootstrap.
